posts.name: Maximilian Dieter Heindl
posts.text:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination
Dear combine experts,
I am trying to follow the recipe to produce the simplified likelihood
[1]. While the production of the covariance matrix and the SL inputs
works reasonably well & fast, the validation of the simplified
likelihood by running the simplifiedLikelihood.C script takes now >14h,
while the regular limit calculation with the Asymptotic Method takes
<10min. Is this expected?
As I am doing this the first time, it might also be that I have made a
mistake in the recipe. The files I produced are all uploaded here [2].
Thank you so much!
Cheers, Maxi
[1] https://twiki.cern.ch/twiki/bin/view/CMS/SimplifiedLikelihood [2]
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1zULre5e2Ifid9_Pd5ZBGqe_Zy_mrYAYJ?usp=sharing
posts.cooked_html:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination

Dear combine experts,

I am trying to follow the recipe to produce the simplified likelihood
[1]. While the production of the covariance matrix and the SL inputs
works reasonably well & fast, the validation of the simplified
likelihood by running the simplifiedLikelihood.C script takes now >14h,
while the regular limit calculation with the Asymptotic Method takes
<10min. Is this expected?

As I am doing this the first time, it might also be that I have made a
mistake in the recipe. The files I produced are all uploaded here [2].

Thank you so much!

Cheers, Maxi

posts.name: Maximilian Dieter Heindl
posts.text:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination
Dear combine experts,
after running for >1d, the simplified likelihood calculation finished,
but the calculated observed limit is >2 as high as the original limit
from the Asymptotic CLs method.
I would really appreciate your help! If you need additional
information/material, I am happy to provide it.
Cheers, Maxi
posts.cooked_html:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination

Dear combine experts,

after running for >1d, the simplified likelihood calculation finished,
but the calculated observed limit is >2 as high as the original limit
from the Asymptotic CLs method.

I would really appreciate your help! If you need additional
information/material, I am happy to provide it.

Cheers, Maxi
